title: Ulitmade 3D Totems
description:
Give the totems specific names and transform them into different 3D totems. 
⚠️Important: Sodium and Iris Shaders are required⚠️
body:
# Ultimate 3D Totems
**⚠️Important: Sodium and Iris Shaders are required ⚠️**

Ultimate 3D Totems is a decorative Minecraft resource pack that adds beautifully detailed 3D totem figures to your world. Each totem is designed as a small collectible decoration — featuring unique, themed characters such as a Santa Claus, a duck, and more. These models bring extra charm and personality to your builds, perfect for festive settings or creative decoration.

The pack includes custom 3D models and high-quality textures, crafted to fit naturally within the Minecraft style while giving each totem a distinct, artistic look.

_Powerd by AgnteEnte_
